metadata.description: Simplicio ecosystem — the Universal Looping AI Orchestrator and its satellite skills (loop, orient, review, compress, learn).

plugins.name: simplicio-loop
plugins.description: Not a chatbot — a worker. /simplicio-loop is the unified public entrypoint for core + hardened loop, driving a whole backlog end-to-end on any LLM or runtime: discover, implement, verify, review, merge, close. It exits only on evidence-gated completion, bounded iteration, or an explicit STOP/cancel path. Runs locally with no telemetry. MIT.
